name: Clutter 17: Flower Power - Collector's Edition
short_description: It's Clutter - but with added Flower Power! Flowers used as Stackers and unmissable new Petal Puzzles are among over 1800 puzzles to keep you playing for days and days. Randomly generated levels mean endless replayability!
detailed_description:
The most entertaining and challenging Clutter yet with over 1800 puzzles to keep you playing for days and days.
So many new Clutter variations mixed in with old favorites for a Quest you'll never forget.

The newest variation you won't want to miss are the Petal Puzzles
And just like regular Clutter levels, they are highly addicting too.
In addition, there are Sliders, Square Jigsaws & Box Quotes.
And wait until you see the Flowers used as Stackers.



You've never seen Clutter this challenging.
New Mah Jong Modes that let you play Mah Jong your way.
And Favorites allow you to collect the puzzles you want to play again and again.



  • New Object Sets & Many New Gameplay Modes
  • Over 1800 levels including a very challenging 100 level Main Quest
  • Extra easy No-Motion Old-School area
  • All new Petal Puzzles that you won't believe
  • New Mah Jong Modes that make Mah Jong even more fun
  • Hundreds of picture puzzles and 200 new Box Quotes puzzles
  • Randomly generated levels mean endless replayability
  • Another Great Soundtrack with a Cinematic Feel
